text: This space stirs my curiosity. The environment is clean, modern, and reflective, filled with glass walls and vibrant colors—suggestive of a place dedicated to innovation and thought. Stepping closer to the R+D display, I feel a sense of anticipation, as if I'm on the brink of discovery. Surrounded by ideas and new technologies on display, I feel both small in the face of progress and uplifted by the shared human pursuit of understanding.
